title: Conversation Confidence
description: Practice real English conversations, listening, and speaking for graduation.
description_sw: Fanya mazoezi ya mazungumzo halisi, kusikiliza, na kuzungumza kwa ajili ya kuhitimu.
sofia_intro: This is the final module. You are ready to talk confidently with recruiters.
sofia_intro_sw: Hii ni moduli ya mwisho. Uko tayari kuzungumza kwa ujasiri na waajiri.

lessons.title: Greetings and Introductions
lessons.sofia_hint: Practice these dialogues by clicking play, then say them yourself.
lessons.sofia_hint_sw: Fanya mazoezi ya mazungumzo haya kwa kubonyeza play, kisha yaseme mwenyewe.

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: Good morning. My name is James. I just joined the team.
lines.sw: Habari za asubuhi. Jina langu ni James. Nimeungana na timu tu.

lines.speaker: Sofia
lines.en: Good morning, James! Nice to meet you. I am Sofia, the team lead.
lines.sw: Habari za asubuhi, James! Furaha kukutana nawe. Mimi ni Sofia, kiongozi wa timu.

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: Nice to meet you too. I am looking forward to working with everyone.
lines.sw: Furaha kukutana nawe pia. Ninasubiri kufanya kazi na kila mtu.

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: My name is James. I have three years of experience in customer service.
lines.sw: Jina langu ni James. Nina uzoefu wa miaka mitatu kwenye huduma za wateja.

lines.speaker: Sofia
lines.en: That is impressive. Why do you want this job?
lines.sw: Hilo ni jambo la kuvutia. Kwa nini unataka kazi hii?

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: I want to grow my skills and contribute to a great team.
lines.sw: Nataka kukuza ujuzi wangu na kuchangia timu nzuri.

exercises.transcript: Our team meeting is at 9 AM in Conference Room B. Please bring your weekly report.
exercises.transcript_sw: Mkutano wa timu uko saa tatu asubuhi kwenye chumba B. Tafadhali lete ripoti yako ya wiki.
exercises.question: What should you bring to the meeting?

exercises.transcript: The deadline for the project has been moved to next Friday.
exercises.transcript_sw: Muda wa mwisho wa mradi umesogezwa hadi Ijumaa ijayo.
exercises.question: What changed about the project?

exercises.transcript: Our client is very happy. We improved their sales by 30%.
exercises.transcript_sw: Mteja wetu ameridhika sana. Tumeongeza mauzo yao kwa 30%.
exercises.question: What was the improvement percentage?

prompts.question: What is your name and where are you from?
prompts.question_sw: Jina lako ni nani na unatoka wapi?
prompts.sample_answer: My name is James. I am from Nairobi, Kenya.
prompts.sample_answer_sw: Jina langu ni James. Ninatoka Nairobi, Kenya.

prompts.question: What kind of work do you do or want to do?
prompts.question_sw: Unafanya kazi gani au unataka kufanya kazi gani?
prompts.sample_answer: I work in customer service. I want to become a team leader.
prompts.sample_answer_sw: Nafanya kazi kwenye huduma za wateja. Nataka kuwa kiongozi wa timu.

prompts.question: Tell me about one achievement you are proud of.
prompts.sample_answer: I improved customer satisfaction by 20% in my last job.
prompts.sample_answer_sw: Niliboresha kuridhika kwa wateja kwa 20% kwenye kazi yangu iliyopita.

lessons.title: Workplace Conversations
lessons.sofia_hint: These are everyday situations. Listen, then repeat each line yourself.
lessons.sofia_hint_sw: Hizi ni hali za kila siku. Sikiliza, kisha rudia kila mstari mwenyewe.

lines.speaker: Manager
lines.en: Please send me the report by end of day.
lines.sw: Tafadhali nitumie ripoti mwisho wa siku.

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: Of course. Which report do you mean — the sales or the budget report?
lines.sw: Bila shaka. Ripoti gani unayomaanisha — ya mauzo au ya bajeti?

lines.speaker: Manager
lines.en: The sales report. Thank you for asking.
lines.sw: Ripoti ya mauzo. Asante kwa kuuliza.

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: Sorry I am late. I was in another meeting.
lines.sw: Samahani nimechelewa. Nilikuwa kwenye mkutano mwingine.

lines.speaker: Sofia
lines.en: No problem. We just started. Please take a seat.
lines.sw: Hakuna tatizo. Tulianza tu. Tafadhali keti.

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: Thank you. Can I get a quick update?

exercises.transcript: Could you please coordinate with the sales team and send me a summary by Thursday?
exercises.transcript_sw: Je, unaweza kuratibu na timu ya mauzo na kunitumia muhtasari ifikapo Alhamisi?
exercises.question: What is the deadline?

exercises.transcript: Your performance review is scheduled for next Tuesday at 2 PM.
exercises.transcript_sw: Tathmini yako ya utendaji imepangwa kwa Jumanne ijayo saa nane mchana.
exercises.question: What is happening next Tuesday?

exercises.transcript: We need to cut the budget by 15%. Please review all project expenses.
exercises.transcript_sw: Tunahitaji kupunguza bajeti kwa asilimia 15. Tafadhali kagua gharama zote za mradi.
exercises.question: What should be reviewed?

exercises.transcript: Great job on the presentation. The client was very impressed with your results.
exercises.transcript_sw: Kazi nzuri kwenye uwasilishaji. Mteja alivutwa sana na matokeo yako.
exercises.question: Who was impressed?

questions.prompt: What is the correct professional morning greeting?
questions.prompt_sw: Salamu sahihi ya asubuhi kwenye mazingira ya kitaaluma ni ipi?
Kauli 'The deadline is next Friday' inamaanisha nini?
Kauli 'Please coordinate with the team' inamaanisha nini?

questions.prompt: What does 'Sorry I am late. I was in another meeting' show?
questions.prompt_sw: Kauli 'Sorry I am late. I was in another meeting' inaonyesha nini?

questions.prompt: Which response is best when asked for clarification?
questions.prompt_sw: Jibu gani ni bora unapoulizwa kutoa ufafanuzi?

questions.prompt: The word 'coordinate' in a workplace means:
